caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap and a green t-shirt is speaking into a professional microphone. His t-shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" printed in white. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with a white mannequin wearing a white shirt and racks of clothes visible in the background. The walls are decorated with numerous framed photographs. In the lower left and right corners of the scene, there are logos, including one that says "RED VELVET". As the man speaks, he shifts his facial expression and uses hand gestures to emphasize his points, moving his right hand in front of him. The camera remains stationary, focusing on him from the chest up as he interacts with the microphone.
